🔐 Security Review

[95] **1. Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw allows drain**
`Vault.withdraw` · Confidence: 95

The withdraw function does not follow checks-effects-interactions pattern.

[80] **2. Missing Access Control on TokenSale.setPrice**
`TokenSale.setPrice` · Confidence: 80

Anyone can call setPrice to manipulate the token price.

[60] **3. Oracle Manipulation via Flash Loan**
`PriceOracle.getPrice` · Confidence: 60

The oracle can be manipulated using a flash loan to skew the TWAP.

## Findings List

| # | Confidence | Title |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [95] | Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw allows drain |
| 2 | [80] | Missing Access Control on TokenSale.setPrice |
| 3 | [60] | Oracle Manipulation via Flash Loan |
